pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — no substantive dome site changes. V51.0 active. Eclipse prediction (Aug 12, 2026, -17 to -21 nT) still featured. 9 consecutive quiet polls.
pipeline_status.analyst: Mode 3 (Globe Fingerprint Hunt). WIN-008 reviewed — transitive fingerprint via WIN-001 + independent spherical spectral structure. 8/67 fingerprints complete.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2 Phase 1: 15/67 WINs reviewed (WIN-001 through WIN-015). Last: WIN-015 (verdict holds, 6 holes, confidence 0.82).
pipeline_status.integrity: WARN — 1 broken external link (INTERMAGNET download 404, site redesigned). All other checks PASS (2017 tests, reproducible build, nav chain valid). NOTE: ISS-512 closed as already-fixed — wins.json already has correct URL.
pipeline_status.expansions_pending_human_apply: EXP-007 (tab reorder — manual HTML), EXP-011 (DOCX parity — manual build-doc-v4.js). Both require structural changes beyond JSON patches.
pipeline_status.patch_backlog: 15 patch files awaiting human application (approx 30-40 patches total).

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. V51.0 active. Wins page shows 98.5% (66/67) vs homepage 95.2% (67/71) — different denominators noted for ongoing monitoring.

new_issues_this_run.description: Wrong Terra-Nova DOI in WIN-005: doi.org/10.1016/j.epsl.2017.06.036 resolves to unrelated Neodymium isotope paper. Correct DOI: doi.org/10.1016/j.pepi.2017.03.002
WIN-015 Cycle 1 recommendations not implemented. Three specific improvements still missing: CUORE reframing, MHz frequency context, near-field mechanism + Bruhn citation paragraph.
new_issues_this_run.suggested_patch: Requires EXP-015 expansion — cannot fix with find/replace.

new_issues_this_run.description: WIN-015 vague apparatus description. We say near-field coupling explains Meyl's results but don't describe what he actually observed or detail the specific failure mode (coil distance, frequency, cage geometry, capacitive coupling path).
WIN-015 conflates Bruhn math critique with experimental refutation. Dome defenders will argue we addressed the math (Bruhn) but not whether Meyl's experiments demonstrate something real.
WIN-015 'Published only in non-peer-reviewed conference proceedings' too absolute. No comprehensive publication audit performed — a dome defender finding one journal paper undermines the claim.

suggested_patch.find: Published only in non-peer-reviewed conference proceedings.
suggested_patch.replace: Published primarily in non-peer-reviewed conference proceedings, with no peer-reviewed replication of the Faraday cage penetration claim identified in standard scientific databases.

new_issues_this_run.description: WIN-015 absence-of-evidence argument not acknowledged as indirect. Should preempt dome defender's 'those experiments don't test Meyl's frequency range' objection.

suggested_patch.find: Thousands of precision experiments globally rely on standard Faraday shielding with no anomalous penetration observed.
suggested_patch.replace: Thousands of precision experiments globally rely on standard Faraday shielding with no anomalous penetration observed — indirect but strong evidence against any scalar wave effect at all energy scales.

new_issues_this_run.description: WIN-002 Cycle 2 moderate: H(r) reconciliation cross-WIN argument not documented. Dome claims three firmament heights reconciled by H(r) but actually picks different r values post-hoc. Belongs in Section 4.5.1, not WIN-002.
new_issues_this_run.suggested_patch: Requires EXP-016 — prose addition to Section 4.5.1.

issues_closed_this_run.reason: Already fixed — wins.json WIN-042 already has correct INTERMAGNET URL (intermagnet.org/data_download.html). Integrity alert was stale (pre-fix). Moved to closed-issues.json.

internal_issues_status_summary.note: All 57 issues are either patched (awaiting human apply), assigned to analyst, or wontfix. No issues have unaddressed open status.

pipeline_health.digest_bug: digest-reviews.js reads 'processed_reviews' key but processed-reviews.json uses 'processed' key — causing 0 C2 reviews to show as processed in digest output. Functional workaround: digest counts via fallback logic. Recommend tinker fix.
pipeline_health.patch_backlog_concern: 15 patch files not yet applied. Human intervention needed to apply chronologically, run sync-code-analysis.js --apply --workspace, then node build.js && node test.js.
pipeline_health.exp_007_011_blocked: EXP-007 (tab reorder) and EXP-011 (DOCX parity) both require manual structural changes — cannot be auto-patched. Will remain in 'complete but unintegrated' state until human applies.

recommended_actions.action: Apply patch ISS-513 (WIN-005 wrong DOI) from suggested-patches-2026-04-07T02-10.json immediately. Clicking the current link goes to a geochemistry paper about asteroids — a credibility-destroying error.

Apply all 15 pending patch files chronologically. Run: for each file in chronological order, node build-scripts/apply-patches.js <file>. Then: node build-scripts/sync-code-analysis.js --apply --workspace && node build.js && node test.js
Manually apply EXP-007 (tab reorder: Part 4 tabs should show Self-Contradictions first). Requires editing docs/index.html tab structure directly.

Assign EXP-015 to analyst: WIN-015 needs full Meyl near-field expansion (~400+ words technical prose on apparatus geometry, near-field coupling physics, Bruhn math vs experiment distinction). Analyst prompt already instructs reading pending expansion tracker items.
